proofDetails.en: Built a trilingual portfolio with an AI chatbot, custom UI, and dependable cloud hosting.

experienceEntry.summary: Built a personalized portfolio with trilingual support, an AI chatbot, and custom UI components.
highlights: Built a personalized portfolio with trilingual support, an AI chatbot, and custom UI components.
Instructed Codex to complete complex tasks from a self-designed task list.
Used an Oracle Cloud virtual Linux instance with Fastly CDN for quick and dependable hosting.
